race.comment: QUILLAN (12) has been thereabouts in her first two starts and is building nicely. Peaking now and is ready to get off the mark. HELL'S ON FIRE (11) is a three-year-old filly on debut for the Hickmott camp. From an elite family that includes G1 victor Viddora, being by Hellbent from Snow Flight. Took out her most recent trial here. Promising type who can make a bright start. CAMOOWEAL GIRL (10) was an eye-catcher here first-up when flashing home from a long way back to grab second. Is drawn to take much closer order this time. Will prove tough to stop if close enough when they sprint. HAKEBA (1) has come along nicely and boasts a fitness edge. Is going better than his record suggests, though will need a smart steer from the tricky alley.
